reason: Check implementation against global stack and RVV-first invariants.
Check tcrv.exec remains ABI/envelope-only for masked store.
Check RVV plugin-local ownership, explicit mask/tail policy, and no legacy authority.
Check common EmitC only consumes provider-built masked-store routes.
Check runtime ABI/artifact mirrors remain derived from provider output.
Check selected-body realization consumes code-affecting policy into body structure.
Check positive, negative, generated-bundle, ssh rvv, and authority-scan evidence.
